name: Azusa Player Scripting
description: Azusa Player client prototype built for the Scripting app on iPhone.

localizedDescriptions.en: An Azusa Player client prototype for Scripting on iPhone, focused on Bilibili import and playback.
localizedDescriptions.zh: 一个运行在 Scripting 上的 Azusa Player iPhone 原型，先验证 Bilibili 导入和播放链路。
